name: Hidden Object Hunt Classic
short_description: Hidden Object Hunt Classic is a thrilling and challenging game that will put your observation skills to the test. Dive into a world of hidden objects as you search for items within a limited time frame.
detailed_description:
Hidden Object Hunt Classic is a thrilling and challenging game that will put your observation skills to the test. Dive into a world of hidden objects as you search for items within a limited time frame.

In this exciting game, your objective is to find a list of hidden objects in various scenes. Each scene is carefully crafted and contains a set of objects that you need to locate. Pay close attention to the details and use your keen eye to spot the hidden items.

As you progress through the levels, the difficulty increases, presenting you with more intricate and challenging scenes. You'll need to observe every nook and cranny, searching for objects cleverly concealed within the scene. From everyday items to unique artifacts, each object is waiting to be found.

Hidden Object Hunt Classic offers a race against time, challenging you to find all the objects within the given time limit. The game tests your focus, concentration, and visual acuity as you strive to complete each level before time runs out.

With its user-friendly interface and simple controls, Hidden Object Hunt Classic provides a seamless gameplay experience. Tap or click on the objects you find to mark them off the list. The game also keeps track of your progress and rewards you for completing levels efficiently.

Immerse yourself in the immersive visuals and enjoy the soothing background music as you embark on your hidden object hunt. The game provides a captivating experience that keeps you engaged and entertained as you uncover hidden treasures.

So, get ready to challenge your observation skills, sharpen your eye for detail, and embark on an exciting journey of discovery in Hidden Object Hunt Classic. Can you find all the hidden objects and complete the levels within the time limit? Start your search now and see if you have what it takes to become a master detective!


Features:
- 3 Game Modes: Easy, Normal, Hard
- 400 Beautiful icons to find
- Play a cool and relaxed match, with no time countdown
- Boost your brainpower and discernment
